MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case no. 467922 (Children's Day School vs. McCarthy)

Appearances: Phillip Atkins-Pattenson for Children's Day School. Robert Leslie for Boyd Power (Trustee). Stephen Kaus for Tracy Kirkham.

Off the record: settlement conference was held and the matters settled.

The matters were called and the terms of the settlement were stated on the record in detail. The parties stipulated to the terms as stated on the record. All future matters before Judge Kahn are vacated. A date on the dismissal calendar in department 212 shall be set no sooner than 60 days. Mr. Kaus is to prepare the settlement agreement.
